failedAssertions.reason: `xcodebuild test` for `LRUPromptCacheTests/testLongerCachedPrefixReturnsTrimmed` failed because the trimmed cache offset stayed at 5 instead of the expected 3.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that prompt-cache batch-integration validation may need targeted `-only-testing` reruns because class-level `PromptCacheBatchIntegrationTests` can fail on unrelated `testExactCacheMatchSkipsPrefill`, and validators should preserve both broad and isolated logs.
